languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн азартно потирает руки.{/n} "Великолепно! Давно у меня не было хорошего оппонента!" {n}Он бросает быстрый взгляд в сторону Нунциуса.{/n} "Не считая моего дражайшего коллеги, конечно же".

{n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн азартно потирает руки.{/n} "Великолепно! Давно у меня не было хорошего оппонента!" {n}Он бросает быстрый взгляд в сторону Нунциуса.{/n} "Не считая моего дражайшего коллеги, конечно же".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."

{n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."

{n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se frota las manos con entusiasmo.{/n} «¡Espléndido! ¡Hace mucho que no tengo un oponente digno!». {n}Lanza una mirada rápida a Nuncius.{/n} «Sin contar a mi querido colega, por supuesto».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn se frota las manos con entusiasmo.{/n} «¡Espléndido! ¡Hace mucho que no tengo un oponente digno!». {n}Lanza una mirada rápida a Nuncius.{/n} «Sin contar a mi querido colega, por supuesto».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡热切地搓了搓手。{/n}“太好了！我已经很久没有遇到过值得一辩的对手了！”{n}他迅速朝努恩修斯的方向瞥了一眼。{/n}“当然，不包括我最亲爱的同僚。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡热切地搓了搓手。{/n}“太好了！我已经很久没有遇到过值得一辩的对手了！”{n}他迅速朝努恩修斯的方向瞥了一眼。{/n}“当然，不包括我最亲爱的同僚。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se frotte les mains, ravi.{/n} « Excellent ! Voilà bien longtemps que je n'avais pas eu d'adversaire digne de ce nom ! » {n}Il lance un rapide coup d'œil à Nuncius.{/n} « À l'exception de mon cher collègue, bien sûr. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn se frotte les mains, ravi.{/n} « Excellent ! Voilà bien longtemps que je n'avais pas eu d'adversaire digne de ce nom ! » {n}Il lance un rapide coup d'œil à Nuncius.{/n} « À l'exception de mon cher collègue, bien sûr. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn reibt sich eifrig die Hände.{/n} "Ausgezeichnet! Ich hatte lange keinen würdigen Gegner mehr!" {n}Er wirft einen kurzen Blick in Nuncius' Richtung.{/n} "Bis auf meinen geschätzten Kollegen natürlich."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn reibt sich eifrig die Hände.{/n}"Ausgezeichnet! Ich hatte lange keinen würdigen Gegner mehr!" {n}Er wirft einen kurzen Blick in Nuncius' Richtung.{/n} "Bis auf meinen geschätzten Kollegen natürlich."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは両手をこすり合わせて喜んだ。{/n}「素晴らしい！久しぶりの対戦相手だ。」{n}彼はヌンキウスの方を一瞥する。{/n}「もちろん、親愛なる同僚は別だ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは両手をこすり合わせて喜んだ。{/n}「素晴らしい！久しぶりの対戦相手だ。」{n}彼はヌンキウスの方を一瞥する。{/n}「もちろん、親愛なる同僚は別だ。」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, hevesle ellerini ovuşturuyor.{/n} "Harika! Uzun zamandır ilk kez kendime layık bir rakiple karşılaşıyorum!" {n}Nuncius'un tarafına doğru hızlıca bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Tabii ki pek değerli meslektaşım hariç."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."
